topic: Text Generation: A Systematic Literature Review of Tasks, Evaluation, and Challenges
topic_definition: Text Generation: A Systematic Literature Review of Tasks, Evaluation, and Challenges

summary_topics.description: Text Generation: A Systematic Literature Review of Tasks, Evaluation, and Challenges

required.criterion: Relevance target: text generation (manual relevance judgment based on titles and abstracts).

exclusion_criteria.criterion: Paper is too specific for the scope of this review (e.g., multimodality).
Work employs studies to another field of study (e.g., medicine).
